creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the disk resource was created in Google Cloud

disk_id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the disk in configurations

effective_labels.description: All labels on the disk, including inherited ones, for organization

id.description: Terraform identifier for the disk resource

label_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint to detect changes in disk labels

last_attach_timestamp.description: Time the disk was last attached to an instance

last_detach_timestamp.description: Time the disk was last detached from an instance

self_link.description: API URL for managing or accessing this disk

source_disk_id.description: Identifier of the original disk used to create this one

source_image_id.description: Identifier of the source image used to create this disk

source_instant_snapshot_id.description: Identifier of the instant snapshot used as this disk's source

source_snapshot_id.description: Identifier of the snapshot used to create this disk

terraform_labels.description: Labels explicitly defined for the disk in Terraform

users.description: Resources currently attached to or using the disk
